declaredLane: documentation lifecycle and acceptance reporting recurrence carryover policy
observedMutationClass: ops owner document update for problem-solving recurrence carryover, lightweight closeout checklist, and scoped recurrence closeout shard
acceptanceEvidenceClass: scoped rules:sync-closeout and rules:lint; no gameplay or Unity runtime acceptance evidence
rootCause: Problem-solving guidance already required root-cause verification and document lifecycle ownership, but it did not explicitly say how to carry recurrence prevention into a future session without over-creating plan documents or hard-fail gates.
prevention: Add a lightweight Recurrence Check to acceptance reporting, route implementation closeout through that check from coding guardrails, and define staged storage in document management: final-only for session-local facts, owner/progress for future-session judgment changes, and recurrence closeout shards only for governance-surface changes. Preserve existing hard-fail coverage for active plan artifact owner shape drift, active plan concrete artifact owner collision, and progress evidence overload.
verification: RULES_LINT_CHANGED_FILES scoped to docs/ops/acceptance_reporting_guardrails.md, docs/ops/codex_coding_guardrails.md, docs/ops/document_management_workflow.md, and artifacts/rules/issue-recurrence-closeout.d/local-c3a8142695.json; npm run --silent rules:sync-closeout; npm run --silent rules:lint
